name: @open-cowork/website
description: Open Cowork Cloud hosted website and web workbench

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @open-cowork/shared build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/ui build && tsc --noEmit && vite build && node ../../scripts/minify-cloud-react-client.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @open-cowork/shared build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/ui build && node --no-warnings --experimental-strip-types --test src/*.test.ts
scripts.test:browser: pnpm run build && pnpm run test:browser:run
scripts.test:browser:run: pnpm run test:browser:dom && pnpm run test:browser:real
scripts.test:a11y: pnpm --filter @open-cowork/shared build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/ui build && pnpm run test:a11y:run
scripts.perf:check: pnpm --filter @open-cowork/shared build && pnpm --filter @open-cowork/ui build && pnpm run perf:check:run
